title: Duros High House
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Duros High House''' was the governing body of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Duro/Legends|Duro]], and was led by the [[Chief Representative Officer]]. It originated as a merchant's council that nearly ruined the planet before being dramatically reformed.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2014-01-24 -->''[[Suns of Fortune]]''
